raw_consumer_statement: I ORIGINALY APPLIED FOR THIS XXXX CARD AND WHEN I RECIEVED THE CARD FROM THE CREATOR I EMEDIATLY CLOSED THE CARD AND NEVER ACTIVATED IT. A LARGE SUM OF MONEY WAS CHARGED TO MY CARD WITHOUT ME ACTIVATING THE ACCOUNT. I EMEADIATLY DECLINE THE CHARGE AND WAS HAVE NEVER RECIEVED ANY RESPONCE FROM THE CREDITOR. THEY CONTINUED TO CALL FOR COLLECTION AND EACH TIME I REQUESTED THAT THIS CHARGE BE DISPUTED. I HAVE NOT RECIEVED ANY RESPONSE TO MY REQUEST. MY XXXX XXXX HAS ALSO BEEN DAMAGED AND WOULD LIKE TO HAVE THIS REMOVED FROM ALL CREDIT REPORTING INSTITUTIONA. I HAVE ATTACHED A DISPUTE LETER I SEND TO THE CREDITOR WITH DATES AND STILL NO RESPONCE.
